# Wikilink Extractor

## What
Create a `wikilinkExtractor` analyzer that extracts `[[internal links]]` from wikitext and diffs them across revisions.

## Why
An article's link neighborhood reveals editorial framing decisions. A fandom article shifting from linking to `[[Fan fiction]]` to linking to `[[Transformative work]]` signals a deliberate recontextualization — detectable without sentiment analysis or model interpretation.

## Context
Read first:
- `packages/analyzers/src/citation-tracker.ts` — closest existing pattern: extract structured items from wikitext, diff across revisions, produce lineage
- `packages/evidence-graph/src/schemas/evidence.ts` — `EventType` union (needs new members), `EvidenceEvent` shape
- `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts` — barrel export pattern
- `packages/analyzers/src/__tests__/citation-tracker.test.ts` — test pattern

## Implementation
1. Add `"wikilink_added" | "wikilink_removed"` to the `EventType` union in `packages/evidence-graph/src/schemas/evidence.ts`
2. Create `packages/analyzers/src/wikilink-extractor.ts`
3. Export a function `extractWikilinks(wikitext: string): string[]` — parses `[[target]]` and `[[target|display]]` syntax, returns normalized link targets (lowercase, underscores → spaces)
4. Export a function `diffWikilinks(before: string[], after: string[]): { added: string[]; removed: string[] }`
5. Export a function `buildWikilinkEvents(beforeWikitext: string, afterWikitext: string, fromRevId: number, toRevId: number, section: string, timestamp: string): EvidenceEvent[]` — produces events following the same shape as other analyzers
6. Export from `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts`
7. Integrate into the `analyze` command pipeline in `packages/cli/src/commands/analyze.ts` — for each section diff, run wikilink extraction

## Invariants
- L1 only — deterministic, regex-based wikilink parsing, no model
- Skip external links (`[http://...]`) and interwiki links (`[[wikipedia:...]]`) — internal only
- Skip file/image links (`[[File:...]]`, `[[Image:...]]`) — focus on article links

## Acceptance
- [ ] Gate: `bun run build && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test`
- [ ] Write tests in `packages/analyzers/src/__tests__/wikilink-extractor.test.ts`:
  - `extractWikilinks` on wikitext with standard links, piped links, no links
  - `diffWikilinks` adds/removes correctly
  - `buildWikilinkEvents` produces correctly shaped events
- [ ] Exported from `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts`
- [ ] Update ROADMAP.md status for L1-03 to `done`
